name: cv-master
tagline: Edits, translates, restyles or generates a CV/resume from a PDF, DOCX, link or raw data — outputs editable HTML + a verified PDF.
verdict: Clean security surface: bundled scripts are read-only, and the one network call is a status-only ping with no data sent. Well-built overall. Weak spot: no version field or changelog, so you can't tell what changed between updates.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes in SKILL.md or README.
Install hints (e.g. pip install pillow) are well-known default-registry packages but unpinned; user-run only.
Bundled scripts are read-only (poppler PDF triage, tool probes); the only network call is a status-code-only ping to fonts.googleapis.com with no data sent — verified safe.
